{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",

  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The output identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and overreaches, walking the argument chain end-to-end.",
    "R1.3": "Each claim is checked against the evidence provided in the paragraph, identifying several issues.",
    "RX.1": "Confidence intervals or other measures of uncertainty are explicitly noted for each point raised.",
    "RX.3": "Every key claim and recommendation is thoroughly audited against the original text.",
    "RX.4": "The output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; it only critiques existing claims.",
    "RX.5": "All non-cosmetic changes are annotated with source and reason."
  },

    "RX.1": 0.85,

rationale.R1.2: The output identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and overreaches, walking the argument chain end-to-end.
rationale.R1.3: Each claim is checked against the evidence provided in the paragraph, identifying several issues.
rationale.RX.1: Confidence intervals or other measures of uncertainty are explicitly noted for each point raised.
rationale.RX.3: Every key claim and recommendation is thoroughly audited against the original text.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; it only critiques existing claims.
rationale.RX.5: All non-cosmetic changes are annotated with source and reason.
